prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: What My Sister Buried
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Menace Christmas
Tagline: Inspired by something, probably.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: a Christmas ornament turning up wet
Relationship dynamic: secret half sibling
Props: ceramic owl, casserole dish, unopened letter

Cast:
- Evelyn Pike | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.44 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family; buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Daniel Dane | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=financial advisor | threat_aura=0.45 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=deleted a voicemail and regretted it spiritually; has a storage unit he refuses to explain
- Gavin Hale | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.54 | space=storage unit described as just storage | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably

- Cole Bell | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=hospital administrator | threat_aura=0.41 | space=storage unit described as seasonal materials | secrets=deleted a voicemail and regretted it spiritually
- Claire Winterson | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=substitute teacher | threat_aura=0.51 | space=storage unit described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it; keeps screenshots like religious texts
- Luke Bell | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Sienna Pruitt | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Daniel Dane is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Evelyn Pike says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Daniel?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Luke. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Evelyn. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The ceramic owl is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Noah."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
